method: Independent Firecrawl re-scrape with standard-HTTP retry for HTML pages. Positive evidence requires the exact original-language quote. Blocked samples come from the full repair pass, are scanned for both product and institutional-access semantics, and every semantic hit must either become a record or carry an explicit evidence-bound exclusion adjudication.

adjudication.rationale: Repository paper about a prototype chatbot; it does not document a current university-provided or endorsed service.
Course and program copy mentions exploring ChatGPT; it does not provide institutional tool access.

results.universityName: Peter the Great St. Petersburg Polytechnic University

adjudication.rationale: Evidence is specific to Hostos Community College and does not establish CUNY-wide access for the ranked university system.
Repository publication-index text produces lexical matches but does not document an institutional AI service.
University-press research article studies AI adoption and mentions products in the literature; it does not document an Istanbul University tool service.
Student activity and competition page mentions AI products but does not offer campus tool access.
The page describes ChatGPT Edu as a future planned option, not a currently available service.
Academic article evaluates ChatGPT in an exam; it does not document university provision or endorsement.

results.universityName: University of Chemistry and Technology, Prague

adjudication.rationale: Referencing guidance names AI products only as citation examples; it does not establish institutional access.

results.universityName: China University of Mining and Technology

adjudication.rationale: Qualification-program marketing uses ChatGPT as a general example; it does not offer an institution-provided ChatGPT account.
Course rules prohibit Perplexity during an exam; prohibition is not provision, procurement, or endorsement.
Exam guidance names public AI systems and permits use only when an examiner allows it; it does not document university-provided access.

results.universityName: Taras Shevchenko National University of Kyiv

adjudication.rationale: Copyright guide discusses third-party licensing news and AI cases; it does not document a Texas Tech AI-tool licence.
